Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I studied by myself in the library.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel smarter after working on some[n]difficult problems without giving up...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should wrap up and return to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
